title: Cobblemon: Mekanism Industries
description: Mekanism + Cobblemon : 3D Production of Balls and XP Candy.
body:
Cobblemon: Mekanism Industries – A Cobblemon & Mekanism Integration Mod

⚙️ Advanced Engineering for Your Pokémon Journey!

Elevate your Cobblemon experience with the automation and power of Mekanism!

Cobblemon: Mekanism Industries is an addon mod that establishes a technological integration between the catching universe of Cobblemon and the machine and energy systems of Mekanism.

Tired of manually gathering Apricorns or relying on basic methods? This mod allows you to utilize Mekanism's pipes, reactors, and processors to automate and optimize the production of essential items, transforming your base into a high-tech Pokémon crafting center!

 

✨ Key Features

🧪 Industrial Automation of Pokémon Items

Harness the power of Mekanism machines to efficiently create crucial resources:

  • Poké Balls (Standard and Special): Craft all your favorite Poké Balls, from the Standard to the rarest ones, by leveraging Mekanism's Processing Chains and Reactions.

   

  • Pokémon Candies: Mass-produce all types of Candies required to nourish, evolve, and boost your Pokémon through chemical and energetic processes.

 

🌈 Apricorn and Seed Processing

Use Mekanism technology to process key ingredients:

  • Apricorn Dyeing: Utilize the Chemical Combiner or other machines to dye white Apricorns into any of the colors needed for different Poké Balls, quickly and scalably.
  • Seed Dyeing: Obtain colored seeds for planting and farming using Mekanism's injection and dyeing systems.

🛠️ Requirements

For Cobblemon: Mekanism Industries to function correctly, you need the following mods installed:

  • ◽ Cobblemon
  • ◽ Cobblemore_lib
  • ◽ Mekanism
  • ◽ Mekanism Generators (Optional, but recommended for energy)
  • ◽ Mekanism Tools (Optional)

💡 Expansion Ideas

If you enjoy this mod, here are some ideas for future updates or new addons:

  1. Poké-Energy: Implement the ability to generate Universal Potential (UP) using the essence of Pokémon (for example, by using a Liquefactor to process a "Power Stone" dropped by a high-level Pokémon), which can then be converted into FE to power Mekanism machines.
  2. Egg Creation: Add a complex Mekanism process (such as using a Matter Synthesizer) to create Pokémon Eggs from rare resources and Type Essences.
  3. Ore Refining: Add quadrupling recipes for Apricorn ores or other Cobblemon-exclusive ores, utilizing Mekanism's refining machines.

 

We hope you enjoy automating your Cobblemon journey!
